Query.tables: RC RR CRC1 CRC2 CRC3 CRC4
Query.Join:
RC.REJECT_CODE = RR.REJECT_CODE AND
RC.CLAIMANT_PCM = CRC1.RV_LOW_VALUE (+) AND CRC1.RV_DOMAIN(+) = 'PREF_COMM_METHOD' AND
RC.CLAIMANT_REP_PCM = CRC2.RV_LOW_VALUE (+) AND CRC2.RV_DOMAIN(+) = 'PREF_COMM_METHOD' AND
RC.DEFENDANT_1_PCM = CRC3.RV_LOW_VALUE (+) AND CRC3.RV_DOMAIN(+) = 'PREF_COMM_METHOD' AND
RC.DEFENDANT_2_PCM = CRC4.RV_LOW_VALUE (+) AND CRC4.RV_DOMAIN(+) = 'PREF_COMM_METHOD'
